title: App Settings - General - Account - Log in
scenario: Verify that after logging in via App Settings > General > Account, the "Your account" section displays the user's name and email without showing share data.
steps: Navigate to App Settings > General > Account
Continue and log in with credentials
expected: The "Your account" text should be visible with Name and Email fields populated with the user's name and email address. Share data should not be visible.
